description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: create_package and upload_package. Add a package job that runs in the create_package stage using the ruby:alpine image, executes `apk --no-cache add bash curl` then `$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.gitlab-ci/package.sh`, and publishes any generated *.deb files as artifacts (paths: $CI_PROJECT_DIR/*.deb); it should run only for tag pipelines. Add an upload_packages job that runs in the upload_package stage using the docker:git image, executes `apk --no-cache add bash` then `$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.gitlab-ci/upload.sh`, and also runs only for tag pipelines. No caches or additional variables are needed.
